mapper.select: SELECT s.*, d.department_name FROM subject s LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.department_id WHERE s.subject_id = #{subjectId}
SELECT s.*, d.department_name FROM subject s LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.department_id WHERE s.subject_code = #{subjectCode}
SELECT s.*, d.department_name FROM subject s LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.department_id ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
SELECT s.*, d.department_name FROM subject s LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.department_id WHERE s.department_id = #{departmentId} ORDER BY s.create_time DESC

SELECT s.*, d.department_name FROM subject s LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.department_id
AND (s.subject_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.subject_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND s.department_id = #{departmentId}
ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subject (subject_name, subject_code, department_id, credit, description) VALUES (#{subjectName}, #{subjectCode}, #{departmentId}, #{credit}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE subject SET subject_name = #{subjectName}, subject_code = #{subjectCode}, department_id = #{departmentId}, credit = #{credit}, description = #{description} WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId}
